# TaskPanels

> TaskPanels helps professionals track their day and automatically turn it into a clean, manager-ready work summary with completed work, blockers, approvals, and next steps.

## About

TaskPanels is a work tracking and summary generation tool for professionals. It is not employee surveillance — it is built for the worker, not the watcher. Users track their day with color-coded panels, tag work by project and context, and generate polished daily summaries they can copy, email, or export.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://taskpanels.app
- Features: https://taskpanels.app/features
- Pricing: https://taskpanels.app/pricing
- Privacy Policy: https://taskpanels.app/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://taskpanels.app/terms
- Application: https://app.taskpanels.app

## Core Features

- Color-coded task panels for visual daily tracking
- Rich context tagging by project, value, status, revisions, blockers, and approvals
- Automatic AI-powered summary generation
- Time by project breakdowns
- Blocker and follow-up tracking
- Unrealized effort tracking for shelved, scrapped, and pivoted work
- Export and email tools for reports and 1:1s
- Weekly rollups across all projects

## Pricing

- Pro: $12/month — Unlimited panels, full summaries, blockers, unrealized effort, weekly reporting, export tools
- Team: $9/user/month — Manager dashboard, team visibility, shared rollups, admin controls

## Target Audience

Professionals who need to document daily work, communicate progress clearly, and prove impact — including designers, engineers, managers, consultants, and freelancers.

## What Makes TaskPanels Different

- Unlike time trackers, TaskPanels adds context (blockers, approvals, value) not just hours
- Unlike project tools (Asana, Jira, Notion), TaskPanels tracks your actual day, not project tasks
- Unlike monitoring software, TaskPanels is controlled by the worker with no surveillance
